title: OpenAI node input format error
symptom: The OpenAI node throws an error indicating that the input values have 2 keys, which is unexpected. This occurs when the input does not match the expected format.
not_this_if: Input data is correctly formatted with a single key
root_cause: The OpenAI node is designed to process input with a single key. If the input data contains multiple keys, it leads to a format mismatch, causing the error.
fix_steps: Add a Function node before the OpenAI node.
Use the provided code to format the input correctly, ensuring it combines multiple values into a single key.
agent_instruction: Insert a Function node to format the input for the OpenAI node correctly.
